title: Saro´s Essentials
description: Server utility mod with warps, homes, kits, economy (/pay, /balance), chat formatting, and moderation (/mute, /ban, /kick) — no plugins needed.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2e475c4c30ecdb44dafcd221a959076a168ecbe.png)

# Saro's Essentials Mod 🛠️

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Essentials/BH_SE_Overview.webp)

Saro's Essentials is a server-side utility mod with the commands every multiplayer server needs: warps, homes, kits, a built-in economy (/pay, /balance), chat formatting, and moderation tools (/mute, /ban, /kick, /warn). No plugins required — works with Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge for Minecraft 1.16.5 through 1.21+

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Essentials/BH_SE_Features.webp)

- ### Config 🎨
  - The mod includes configuration options for customizing color codes, allowing you to adjust and personalize color settings to suit your preferences.
  - **You can deactivate any command in the Config.**
  - Custom /broadcast prefix.
  - Option to change for each command whether you need op for it

- **Economy System💰**
 - Bank Accounts for Players


- **Info for permission mods⚠️**
If you use a mod like, for example, LuckPerms 
 - you can assign permissions as follows:

 - first set all commands in the config to only op can use them (is set like this by default)

 - you can add the permissions as follows `command.(command name)`
 - example for `/back` is the permission `command.back`


  
- **All Useful Commands** ⚙️
  - **/motd**: to set a custom MOTD for the server
  - **/clearundo**: to undo /clear 
  - **/cleanundo**: to undo /clean 
  - **/cleanhundo**: to undo /cleanh 
  - **/addlore**: Add lore to an item.
  - **/back**: Teleport back to the previous location (e.g., where you used /tp).
  - **/banip**: Ban a user's IP address (Only 1.12.2 newer versions use /ban-ip).
  - **/broadcast**: Send a message to the entire chat.
  - **/clean**: Clear the inventory except for armor slots.
  - **/cleanh**: Clear the hotbar.
  - **/clear**: Clear the entire inventory.
  - **/day**: Set the time to day.
  - **/delete**: Instantly delete the specified entity.
  - **/ec**: Open an ender chest.
  - **/feed**: Refill your hunger bar.
  - **/fly**: Toggle flying mode on/off.
  - **/glow**: Make the item in your hand glow.
  - **/gm 0:1:2:3**: Switch between gamemodes.
  - **/god**: Toggle god mode on/off.
  - **/head** or **/skull**: Give a player's head.
  - **/heal**: Heal a player.
  - **/home**: Create and teleport to home locations.
  - **/inventory save:load:delete**: Save, load, or delete inventory data.
  - **/inv** or **/invsee**: View other players' inventories.
  - **/night**: Set the time to night.
  - **/rain**: Start raining.
  - **/removelore**: Remove lore from items.
  - **/rename**: Rename an item easily.
  - **/setlore**: Replace the lore on an item.
  - **/setspawn**: Set the spawn point (players will spawn here when they join).
  - **/spawn**: Teleport to the spawn point.
  - **/sudo**: Force another player to execute a command.
  - **/sun**: Set the weather to sunny.
  - **/tempban**: Temporarily ban a player.
  - **/thunder**: Start a thunderstorm.
  - **/tpall**: Teleport all players to you.
  - **/tphere**: Teleport a player to you.
  - **/tpoffline**: Teleport to the ghost of an offline player.
  - **/unbanip**: Unban an IP address. (Only 1.12.2 newer versions use /pardon-ip).
  - **/unbreakable**: Make the item in your hand unbreakable.
  - **/trash**: Open a Trash GUI.
  - **/vanish** or **/v <playername>**: Hide a player from others.
  - **/warp <warpname>**: Teleport to a warp point.
  - **/setwarp <warpname>**: Set a new warp point.
  - **/delwarp <warpname>**: Delete an existing warp point.
  - **/warps**: List all warp points.
  - **/kit create <name>**: Create a new kit.
  - **/kit delete <name>**: Delete an existing kit.
  - **/kit list**: List all kits.
  - **/kit give <playername> <name>**: Give a kit to a player.
  - **/tpa <playername>**: Request to teleport to another player.
  - **/tpahere <playername>**: Request another player to teleport to you.
  - **/tpaaccept**: Accept a teleport request.
  - **/tpadeny**: Deny a teleport request.
  - **/pay <playername> <amount>**: Transfer money to another player.
  - **/eco add <playername> <amount>**: Add money to a player's account.
  - **/eco set <playername> <amount>**: Set a player's money balance.
  - **/eco get <playername>**: Check a player's money balance.
  - **/eco take <playername> <amount>**: Remove money from a player's account.
  - **and more...**

![Versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Essentials/BH_SE_SupportedVersions.webp)

*   **Forge/Fabric/NeoForge 26.1** ✅
- **Forge 1.21.8** ✅

- **Forge/Fabric 1.21.5** ✅

- **Forge/Fabric 1.21.1** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.21** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.20.6** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric/NeoForge 1.20.4** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.20.1** ✅

- **Forge/Fabric 1.19.2** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.16.5** ⚠️ Updates partially discontinued
- **Forge 1.12.2** ⚠️ Updates partially discontinued

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
